components.value: V, S, M (a lump of coal)

description.value: A cone of tiny, sparkling slivers as hard and sharp as fled diamonds springs from your outstretched fingers at tremendous speed. Any creature in the area of the torrent takes 1d6 points of slashing damage per caster level (maximum 10d6). These magical slivers are treated as adamantine and cold iron for the purpose of overcoming damage reduction. In addition, this spell bypasses up to 1 point of an objectâs hardness per 2 caster levels (maximum 10). Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder 24: The Final Wish.
